ocr_text: A LONG TIME AGO, FIGHTERS OF JIANGHU LEARNED MARTIAL ARTS IN ORDER TO PROTECT THEMSELVES FROM ENEMIES. / OVER TIME, MARTIAL ARTS EVOLVED FROM USING IT AS A METHOD OF SELF-DEFENSE INTO A TOOL TO KILL ENEMIES / IT GREW TO BE MORE SOPHISTICATED AND COMPLEX AS THE SIMPLE FORMS BECAME A SERIES OF MOVEMENTS AND THE BREATHING TECHNIQUES REPRESENTED THE BASICS OF INTERNAL ENERGY. / THE MARTIAL ARTISTS PASSED ON THEIR TEACHINGS AND HEIRLOOMS TO THE FUTURE GENERATIONS, ALLOWING MARTIAL ARTS TO CONTINUE TO EVOLVE. / THE PEOPLE WHO HAD MASTERED MARTIAL ARTS WERE MORE POWERFUL THAN NORMAL HUMANS, AND THEY WERE SOON CALLED THE MOORIM PEOPLE (WULIN).
visual_description: Demonstrating the evolution of martial arts, a bald monk-like fighter transitions from a defensive stance to dynamic kicks, sits in deep meditation surrounded by ancient scrolls, and finally unleashes a powerful, ground-shattering fist strike. This vertical montage is set against a textured, parchment-like background.

ocr_text: FIGHTERS WHO WANTED TO BE DISCIPLES OF THE MOORIM PEOPLE GATHERED TO FORM CLANS,
visual_description: Standing atop a rocky outcrop, a long-haired figure in a flowing cloak looks out over a vast, windy landscape under a bright, hazy sky. Dry grass and leaves blow in the wind around them in a wide shot.

ocr_text: AND THOSE CLANS WERE DIVIDED INTO THE FORCES OF JUSTICE AND THE FORCES OF EVIL.
visual_description: Standing in front of their respective armies, two martial arts leaders represent opposing factions in a split-screen panel. The left side shows a white-haired man in blue robes under a blue sky, while the right side shows a dark-haired warrior in fur-trimmed armor against a fiery red backdrop.

ocr_text: AND BETWEEN THE TIGHT / BALANCE OF THOSE TWO FORCES, / THERE WAS ANOTHER GROUP THAT / PURSUED AN ENTIRELY DIFFERENT / ROUTE, SEEKING ONLY STRENGTH...
visual_description: Displaying white stylized text on a solid black background, this narrative caption panel contains no characters or setting details.

ocr_text: THE WORLD CALLED THEM THE DEMONIC CULT.
visual_description: Standing atop a grand temple staircase, a long-haired leader flanked by six guards addresses a massive crowd of followers wearing matching dark robes. The imposing, dark palace rises behind them under a reddish, smoky sky in a wide shot.

ocr_text: THE ILLEGITIMATE CHILD OF THE HIGHEST-RANKING FAMILY IN THE DEMONIC CULT WHO HAS THE RIGHT TO THE THRONE.
visual_description: Standing with his back to the viewer, a long-haired man in a yellow and black robe faces a group of bowing subordinates in dark uniforms. Medium shot, set against a hazy background of traditional temple buildings.

ocr_text: THIS IS CHEON YEO / WOON'S STORY.
visual_description: Displaying white stylized text on a solid black background, this minimalist panel serves as an introductory title card.
Displaying the stylized title logo of the webtoon 'Nano Machine' in dark red, brush-stroke calligraphy with Hanja characters underneath against a white background.
Displaying the Korean word '그림' in a simple black font against a plain white background, cropped closely around the text.
Displaying the stylized Korean text '금강불괴' in a bold, traditional-style font against a plain white background.
Displaying black Korean characters in a traditional serif font against a plain white background, framed in a tight close-up shot.
Spanning horizontally across a plain white background, a thin grey divider line features two small circular nodes.
Stretching horizontally across a plain white background, a thin grey divider line features small circular dots near its ends.

Staring intensely with a single wide-open purple eye, a sweat-drenched character with dark hair looks forward in an extreme close-up. Strands of hair fall across their face, and sweat drips down their cheek.
Sitting up abruptly in bed with a shocked, sweating expression, a young man with messy dark hair gasps awake. He wears blood-stained robes in a wooden room. Medium shot.
Curving smoothly across a plain white background, a single thick black line forms a wide arc resembling the top of a speech bubble.

ocr_text: I'M... / ALIVE? / BUT I'M SURE MY STOMACH WAS PIERCED BY THAT SWORD...?
visual_description: Sitting up in bed and staring at his hands in disbelief, a bruised, long-haired young man in tattered, blood-stained robes realizes he is alive. The medium shot shows him in a dimly lit room with wooden window frames and bookshelves in the background.
Curving smoothly across a plain white background, a single black line forms a simple arc resembling the top of a speech bubble.

ocr_text: HAPPENED...? / 스윽 / WHY IS MY WHOLE BODY SWEATING?
visual_description: Wiping sweat from his forehead, a bloodied and bruised young man with long dark hair looks down in shock inside a wooden room.

Coughing up blood while sitting up in bed, a dark-haired young man in blood-stained robes clutches his mouth in pain. High-angle shot of the character on a traditional floor mat with dramatic speed lines.
